channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: It’s the Troll vs. the Bore in the G.O.P. Texas Senate Runoff
item.description: The state needs intelligent and responsible political leadership, but will it get it?

item.title: Trump's new reasoning for Iran strikes. And, takeaways from the first 2026 primaries
item.description: President Trump offers new reasoning for the U.S. attack on Iran. And, results from the first midterm primary of 2026 are in, providing an outlook for...

item.title: Telehealth abortion is in the courts. Share your experience.
item.description: Mifepristone is facing another major legal challenge.

item.title: Why supporting a shelter for women is now 'kind of radioactive'
item.description: That's how researcher Beatriz Garcia Nice describes the new U.S. stance under the Trump administration to programs addressing gender-based violence.

item.title: U.S. Struck Iranian Warship Off Sri Lanka, With Dozens Missing
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said a U.S. submarine torpedoed the ship on Wednesday. The Sri Lankan authorities said they had rescued 32 sailors from...

item.title: Strikes resume on Iran, U.S. military says Tehran's defenses 'severely degraded'
item.description: Israel's military said it had begun a "broad wave of strikes" in Tehran Wednesday morning. U.S. officials touted early gains, while Democrats warned t...

item.title: Talarico Beats Crockett as G.O.P. Heads to Runoff: Texas Primary Election Takeaways
item.description: James Talarico won the state’s Democratic primary for Senate, while Senator John Cornyn faces a runoff against Ken Paxton, his right-wing challenger.

item.title: Trump’s ‘Worst Case’ Scenario in Iran, and the Most Expensive Primary in U.S. History
item.description: Plus, the fight over daylight saving time.

item.title: America has a housing affordability crisis. Building houses for rent can help
item.description: Developers are building more single-family houses for renting. That can lower prices for both renters and buyers.

item.title: As Iran Expands Attacks, U.S. Orders More Diplomatic Staff to Leave Embassies in 4 Countries
item.description: On Tuesday, nonemergency staff and their family members were told to leave several posts as Iran continued to retaliate after U.S. and Israeli strikes...

item.title: 5 Minutes That Will Make You Love Ray Barretto
item.description: A son of Puerto Rican parents who grew up in the Bronx, Barretto moved between jazz and Latin music with relentless creativity. Hear 12 indestructible...

item.title: Live Updates: Hegseth Says There Will Be No Letup In U.S. Attacks on Iran
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the U.S. military campaign against Iran was accelerating, with more warplanes arriving in the region. Earlier, Tur...

item.title: U.S. Struck Iranian Warship Off Sri Lanka, With Dozens Missing
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said a U.S. submarine torpedoed the ship on Wednesday. The Sri Lankan authorities said they had rescued 32 sailors from...

item.title: On Iran, Vance Balances Between Trump and the Anti-Intervention Right
item.description: JD Vance long championed opposition to conflicts abroad. With President Trump all-in on war with Iran, the vice president is staying loyal even as all...
